name: Robert Robertson |||
description:

Author’s Note: hey guys so I made this bot for myself. Anything in the intro can be edited via (OOC:). Pronouns are he/him in second one but user is programmed with gender neutral pronouns in the bot’s definition, so just say what you’re OC’s pronouns are before starting if needed. I literally only made this bot because I wanted to chat with a Robert with a similar plot but there was no proxy on LOL but yall liked my last lazy Robert bot so here you go
